user_query: I'm organizing a networking event and I want to gather some valuable data about a company. Could you provide me with the company data for the LinkedIn internal ID '123456'? Also, I need some filler text for the event brochure. Can you generate three paragraphs of lorem ipsum text?

TaskList.description: Retrieve company information based on the LinkedIn internal ID '123456'.
Generate three paragraphs of lorem ipsum text for the event brochure.
